name: claude-code-sessions
description: TUI for browsing every local Claude Code session (CLI + Mac-app Local) in one place. Reads ~/.claude/projects/**/*.jsonl directly.

prerequisites.name: go
prerequisites.install_hint: Install Go 1.21+: https://go.dev/dl/  (macOS: brew install go  ·  Windows: winget install GoLang.Go)

methods.name: git+go
methods.command: mkdir -p $HOME/.local/share && { [ -d $HOME/.local/share/claude-code-sessions/.git ] && git -C $HOME/.local/share/claude-code-sessions pull --ff-only || git clone https://github.com/arghhhhh/claude-code-sessions.git $HOME/.local/share/claude-code-sessions; } && cd $HOME/.local/share/claude-code-sessions && go build .

post_install_hints: Binary installed at ~/.local/share/claude-code-sessions/ (claude-code-sessions on macOS/Linux, claude-code-sessions.exe on Windows).
The `cs` shell function is installed automatically into ~/.bashrc, ~/.zshrc (when present), and the PowerShell profile (Windows). Restart your shell, then run `cs` from any directory.
Keys: ↑/↓ navigate · enter resume · d +--dangerously-skip-permissions · c +--chrome · D both · / search · q quit
